status.note: Confirmed in chat thread (acceptance layers + final delivery). Polish must not drop these constraints. Do not run generative skill_polish.py overwrite on mature granoflow skills—manual polish + preservation tests only.

skill.name: granoflow-acceptance-delivery
skill.summary: Cross-cutting contracts for Layer A/B milestone acceptance and final delivery (unit/IT/E2E paths). Owned as references under granoflow-agent-workflow plus IT/E2E campaign Skills.
skill.purpose: Keep milestone delivery at user-invisible IT; offer final delivery after Layer B; path by project feature-milestone count; E2E always full-project.
triggers: Milestone Layer B / 里程碑集成验收
开始最终交付 / 开始完整交付 / 交付测试
user_examples: 里程碑集成验收怎么跑

constraints.text: Task Layer A and milestone Layer B stay two labeled sections; never fuse into one unlabeled all-done blob (acceptance_layers_fused).
Milestone delivery ends at user-invisible milestone-scoped integration tests; no user-visible E2E required to accept a milestone.
Before milestone implement: IT sufficiency + Suite Plan; orchestrate minimal order (e.g. add/browse/list before delete).
After Layer B IT green: record Experience from issues; write 任务回顾 for covered tasks.
Final delivery May be offered after any feature milestone Layer B green, including when only one milestone finished this run/day.
Exactly one project feature milestone → pre_e2e_path e2e_direct: skip portfolio unit + integration_campaign; integration_gate waived_single_milestone; then full-project E2E.
Two or more feature milestones → full_unit_and_it: full unit suite → all user-invisible project IT → full-project E2E.
E2E is always full-project; narrowing to touched screens fails closed (full_delivery_e2e_not_full_project).
E2E success requires orchestrated suite green, Phase B AI loop complete, user_final_acceptance, evidence pack, Closing Summary, visible window; screenshots under temp/.
Meaningful App writes (Experience / 任务回顾 / campaign closeouts that write App state) keep preview → confirm → write.
Project-wide integration_campaign / final delivery does not replace per-feature-milestone Layer B.

workflow.title: Layer A task closeout
workflow.goal: Finish child task with Delivery / acceptance_report; author IT but do not run suite.
success_criteria: IT authored not executed in feature task
rules: No milestone claim from child done alone

workflow.title: Layer B milestone IT
workflow.goal: Preflight + orchestrated milestone-scoped IT to green; Experience + 任务回顾.

workflow.title: Final delivery
workflow.goal: Offer/enter final delivery; path by project_feature_milestone_count; E2E always full-project.
rules: May start after any Layer B green
